rationale: The proposed change to the residence homestead exemption under §11.13(b) has no relation to §11.4391, which governs late applications for the Freeport goods exemption. The provisions address entirely separate exemption categories.
quote: The chief appraiser shall accept and approve or deny an application for an exemption for freeport goods under Section 11.251 after the deadline for filing it has passed
_note: No conflict. §11.4391 concerns Freeport exemption late-filing penalties; proposed change targets residence homestead exemption amount under §11.13(b).
